data.title: CryptoQuant: Bitcoin Market Turns Bullish as Holders Accumulate BTC
data.description:
TL;DR Long-term investors have steadily increased their realized capital beyond $20 billion, clearly indicating a strong accumulation phase. Binance has significantly raised its Bitcoin spot market share from 26% to 35%, firmly taking the lead in global trading volume. More than 20,000 BTC have exited major exchanges such as Kraken and Bitfinex within just two. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/cryptoquant-bitcoin-market-turns-bullish-as-holders-accumulate-btc/

data.title: BitFuFu: 400 BTC mined in May, up 91.4% from the previous month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin mining company BitFuFu Inc. announced its unaudited production and mining operations update for May 2025. In May 2025, Bitcoin mining produced 400 BTC, a month-on-month increase of 91.4%, of which cloud mining produced 357 BTC and self-mining produced 43 BTC. The total Bitcoin holdings were 1,709 BTC, a decrease of 199 BTC from April 30, 2025, due to the active sale of U.S. Treasuries. As of May 31, 2025, the total managed hash rate increased by 20.5% month-on-month to 34.1 EH/s. (Globenewswire)

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours

data.title: Sygnum Bank: Bitcoin liquidity crunch may trigger a new round of upward price fluctuations
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sygnum Bank pointed out in its latest market outlook analysis that the circulating supply of Bitcoin has decreased by about 30% in the past 18 months, resulting in a significant decline in market liquidity. Analysts said that with the increase in ETF fund inflows and the rising interest of governments in Bitcoin reserves, the market may face a "demand shock", that is, the number of buyers far exceeds the amount of available coins. 
In addition, the turmoil in the U.S. Treasury market and the weakening of the U.S. dollar have increased the attractiveness of Bitcoin as a safe-haven asset, further driving demand for it. These factors together may trigger upward fluctuations in Bitcoin prices in the coming months. (CoinDesk)

data.title: OrcaMind.ai Closes Whitelist Applications for AI Agent Platform
data.description:
According to Odaily, OrcaMind.ai, a platform for on-chain transaction AI agents, has announced that its official whitelist application will close in 48 hours. The application process began on May 29 and was open to users worldwide, concluding on June 6 after a week-long period. The platform has stated that users selected for the whitelist will have early access to the product and enjoy benefits such as zero-barrier participation in point tasks, point bonuses, and exclusive community identities.

The core chat functionality of the platform was launched this week and now supports major networks including Arbitrum, Ethereum, and BSC. Users can perform various on-chain operations such as queries, transfers, and staking. OrcaMind.ai is built on a native Web MCP architecture, eliminating the need for downloading a client. Users can execute AI-driven on-chain operations by simply installing the official MCP Server plugin.

data.title: Blockchain and AI Convergence to Propel DePIN Market Growth
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the integration of blockchain technology with artificial intelligence is expected to significantly boost the decentralized physical infrastructure network (DePIN) market, potentially surpassing $3.5 trillion within the next three years. This projection comes from a report by the World Economic Forum (WEF), highlighting the transformative potential of DePIN, which combines blockchain with community-owned physical infrastructure to create decentralized networks. Participants in these networks can contribute resources in exchange for cryptocurrency.

Currently, the DePIN sector is valued between $30 billion and $50 billion, with over 1,500 active projects globally. The WEF report suggests that the most significant driver of growth in this industry is the rise of decentralized physical AI (DePAI). DePAI represents a fundamental shift in how AI agents interact with physical infrastructure and external data. Unlike centralized models, DePAI utilizes decentralized networks where users contribute to machine learning processes through everyday activities, thereby freeing AI development from the constraints of centralized data sets.

Industry leaders also anticipate substantial market opportunities in DePIN, fueled by the increasing demand for decentralized wireless hardware connectivity. Carlos Lei Santos, co-founder and CEO of Uplink, expressed in an interview that the next trillion-dollar company is likely to emerge from the DePIN industry, driven by this growing need for decentralized wireless solutions. The WEF report further notes that as DePIN adoption increases, it could reshape the future of omni computing by fostering a more distributed and resilient computing environment.

Decentralized applications such as Bittensor and Threefold exemplify the growth potential within the DePIN sector by enhancing interoperability among its key infrastructure components. Bittensor facilitates the development of decentralized AI models, while Threefold provides users with a sovereign digital identity system for Web3. This democratization of AI training ensures that models remain diverse and contextually relevant, while contributors are compensated through blockchain-based incentive systems. Additionally, a report from crypto research firm Messari predicts that the DePIN market could reach $3.5 trillion by 2028, marking an increase of over $1.3 trillion from the current addressable market of $2.2 trillion.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Urges Federal Reserve to Cut Interest Rates
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump has called on Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell to lower interest rates. This statement comes amid ongoing discussions about the economic strategies needed to address current financial challenges.

data.title: James Wynn launches another fundraising campaign
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News James Wynn deleted the previous fundraising tweet after his position turned from loss to profit. Due to the short-term decline of BTC, he was close to liquidation again and launched fundraising again. 
According to the monitoring of chain data analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa), as Bitcoin fell below $10,5000 in a short period of time, James Wynn's position was only $233 away from the liquidation price of $104,720. He currently still holds 1201 BTC (126 million US dollars) in long orders, with a floating loss of nearly $1.4 million.

data.title: OrcaMind.ai, the on-chain AI Agent launch platform, will close its whitelist application in 48 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OrcaMind.ai, the launch platform for on-chain transaction AI Agent, announced that the official whitelist application will be officially closed in 48 hours. The application was launched on May 29 and opened to global users. It officially ended on June 6 and will be open for one week. Officials said that whitelisted users will be the first to experience the product and enjoy multiple rights and interests such as zero-threshold participation in points tasks, points bonus, and exclusive community identity.
The platform's core chat function has been launched this week, and now supports mainstream networks such as Arbitrum, Ethereum, and BSC. Users can now perform multiple on-chain operations such as query, transfer, and pledge.
OrcaMind.ai is built on the native Web MCP architecture. There is no need to download the client. Just install the official MCP Server plug-in with one click to call AI to perform on-chain operations.

data.title: dYdX Plans to Conclude Ethereum Bridge Support
data.description: According to PANews, dYdX has issued a reminder that over 52 million ethDYDX tokens have yet to be migrated to the native DYDX tokens on the dYdX chain. Following a community-approved text proposal, which received approximately 91% approval, a final on-chain proposal is expected to be initiated on June 9, 2025, to end support for the Ethereum-dYdX chain cross-chain bridge.

data.title: U.S. Employment Figures Fall Short of Expectations in May
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the United States reported an increase of 37,000 jobs in May, significantly below the anticipated 110,000. The previous month's figure was 62,000.

data.title: Semler Scientific spends $20 million to buy 185 more Bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Semler Scientific, a US-listed company, announced that it had purchased an additional 185 bitcoins for $20 million. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: US ADP employment in May was 37,000, expected to be 110,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of ADP employment in the United States in May was 37,000, the expected number was 110,000, and the previous value was 62,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: The number of "small non-agricultural" workers recorded the smallest increase since March 2023, and the US dollar index fell in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The US ADP employment in May recorded 37,000, the smallest increase since March 2023, and the market expected 110,000. After the release of the US ADP employment, the US dollar index DXY fell more than 15 points in the short term and is now at 99.1. Spot gold rose by $6 in the short term and is now at $3,353 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: K Wave Media to sell $500 million in common stock to support strategic Bitcoin reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq's first Korean media alliance K Wave Media Inc. (NASDAQ: KWM) announced today that it has reached a securities purchase agreement with Bitcoin Strategic Reserve KWM LLC, through which the company will issue $500 million in common stock. The proceeds from this financing will be used to support the company's Bitcoin-centric digital asset reserve strategy, working capital and M&A activities, and further expand its content production and K-POP-related businesses. According to this strategic framework, K Wave will use most of the proceeds from the financing for long-term holding and yield optimization of Bitcoin (BTC) under certain restrictions-making it one of the first listed media companies in the world to directly incorporate BTC into core fund management. In addition, the company plans to operate Bitcoin Lightning Network nodes and invest in Bitcoin native infrastructure to enhance decentralized properties and obtain on-chain transaction rewards. Officials said that K Wave aims to become the "Korean version of Metaplanet"-referring to the case of Japan's Metaplanet, the company became the world's best performing stock after adopting a Bitcoin reserve strategy in 2024, and continued to lead in 2025. (Businessinsider)
